docs.title: BAO GIA DE XUAT - Enterprise Chatbot | AI
1. Thong tin chung
docs.text:
• Khach hang:
  • Don vi cung cap:
  • Phien ban bao gia: v1.0
  • Ngay bao gia:
  • Hieu luc bao gia: 30 ngay ke tu ngay phat hanh

docs.title: 2. Muc tieu pham vi
docs.text: Bao gia nay ap dung cho goi trien khai chatbot theo huong production-ready, bao gom: - Xay dung/hoan thien chatbot price bot va guide bot - Bo tai lieu governance va operations (UAT, go-live, risk, SLA/SLO, runbook) - Ho tro deploy staging/production co huong dan van hanh

docs.title: Goi A - Foundation
docs.text:
• Phu hop: PoC nhanh, quy mo nho
  • Pham vi:
  • Cai dat backend/frontend co ban
  • Tich hop 2 bot (price, guide)
  • Bo tai lieu cot loi: UAT checklist, go-live checklist
  • Thoi gian: 2-3 tuan
  • Bao gia: 120,000,000 VND

docs.title: Goi B - Professional
docs.text:
• Phu hop: Trien khai nghiem tuc cho don vi van hanh noi bo
  • Pham vi:
  • Toan bo Goi A
  • Them risk register, SLA/SLO, runbook incident
  • Benchmark co ban (latency/error/quality)
  • Chuyen giao onboarding cho team van hanh
  • Thoi gian: 4-6 tuan
  • Bao gia: 240,000,000 VND

docs.title: Goi C - Enterprise Readiness
docs.text:
• Phu hop: Don vi can muc governance cao va san sang mo rong
  • Pham vi:
  • Toan bo Goi B
  • Hardening production (auth, RBAC, audit logging baseline)
  • Tu van readiness theo control intent ISO 27001/SOC 2
  • Ho tro go-live + hypercare 2 tuan
  • Thoi gian: 8-10 tuan
  • Bao gia: 420,000,000 VND

docs.title: 4. Dich vu van hanh hang thang (tuy chon)
docs.text:
• Goi Monitoring & Support co ban: 25,000,000 VND/thang
  • Theo doi SLO co ban, ho tro su co P2/P3 gio hanh chinh
  • Goi Monitoring & Support nang cao: 45,000,000 VND/thang
  • Theo doi 24/7, ho tro P1/P2/P3, review rui ro va KPI hang thang

docs.title: 5. Bang tom tat chi phi
docs.text: Hang muc Goi A Goi B Goi C Trien khai mot lan 120,000,000 240,000,000 420,000,000 Van hanh co ban/thang (tuy chon) 25,000,000 25,000,000 25,000,000 Van hanh nang cao/thang (tuy chon) 45,000,000 45,000,000 45,000,000

docs.title: 6. Dieu khoan thuong mai
docs.text:
• Gia tren chua bao gom VAT.
  • Thanh toan de xuat:
  • 40% khi ky hop dong
  • 40% khi hoan tat UAT
  • 20% khi go-live/ban giao
  • Yeu cau thay doi pham vi se duoc danh gia va bao gia bo sung.

docs.title: 7. Gia dinh va pham vi khong bao gom
docs.text:
• Khach hang cung cap dau moi nghiep vu va phe duyet noi dung corpus.
  • Khong bao gom chi phi ha tang cloud/on-prem (server, database, monitoring tool license).
  • Khong bao gom phi chung nhan compliance chinh thuc boi ben thu ba.
  • Tich hop voi he thong ben thu ba se danh gia rieng neu co API dac thu.

docs.title: 8. Lo trinh trien khai de xuat
docs.text:
• Tuan 1: Kickoff, chot pham vi, chuan hoa corpus

docs.title: CHECKLIST KY HOP DONG - Enterprise Chatbot | AI

Sau khi nhan ban ky hop le, ben em se: - Xac nhan hieu luc hop dong; - Gui ke hoach kickoff chi tiet; - Kich hoat cac dau viec trien khai theo milestone.

Tran trong, [Ten ban] [Chuc danh] - [Cong ty] [So dien thoai] | [Email]

Tran trong / Best regards, [Ten ban / Your Name] [Title] - [Company] [Phone] | [Email]

4.1 Gia tri hop dong
docs.text:
• Tong gia tri hop dong: [SO_TIEN] VND (Bang chu: [BANG_CHU]).
  • Gia tri tren [chua/da] bao gom VAT.

docs.title: 4.2 Phuong thuc thanh toan
docs.text:
Thanh toan theo tien do: - Dot 1: 40% gia tri hop dong sau khi ky hop dong; - Dot 2: 40% gia tri hop dong sau khi hoan tat UAT (bien ban xac nhan); - Dot 3: 20% gia tri hop dong sau khi go-live/ban giao.

Thong tin hoa don, chung tu va thanh toan thuc hien theo quy dinh phap luat hien hanh.

docs.title: Dieu 5. Nghiem thu va ban giao
docs.text:
• Tieu chi nghiem thu theo Phu luc 03 (UAT/Acceptance Criteria).
  • Ben A co trach nhiem phan hoi ket qua nghiem thu trong [SO_NGAY] ngay lam viec ke tu khi nhan thong bao nghiem thu.
  • Neu qua thoi han phan hoi ma khong co y kien bang van ban, duoc xem la da tam chap nhan theo pham vi da ban giao.

docs.title: Dieu 6. Quyen va nghia vu cua Ben A
6.1 Quyen cua Ben A
docs.text:
• Yeu cau Ben B thuc hien dung pham vi, tien do va chat luong da cam ket.
  • De nghi Ben B giai trinh, khac phuc cac van de phat sinh trong pham vi hop dong.

docs.title: 6.2 Nghia vu cua Ben A
docs.text:
• Cung cap day du thong tin, tai khoan, du lieu, dau moi nghiep vu de Ben B trien khai;
  • Phoi hop nghiem thu dung han;
  • Thanh toan day du, dung han theo Dieu 4.

docs.title: Dieu 7. Quyen va nghia vu cua Ben B
7.1 Quyen cua Ben B
docs.text:
• Yeu cau Ben A cung cap thong tin va phoi hop can thiet;
  • Tu choi cac yeu cau ngoai pham vi neu chua co thoa thuan bo sung.

docs.title: 7.2 Nghia vu cua Ben B
docs.text:
• Thuc hien dich vu dung pham vi, tien do va chat luong da cam ket;
  • Bao dam bao mat thong tin theo Dieu 8;
  • Ho tro Ben A trong qua trinh nghiem thu va ban giao.

docs.title: Dieu 8. Bao mat thong tin
docs.text:
• Hai ben cam ket bao mat tat ca thong tin lien quan den hop dong va du lieu trao doi trong qua trinh thuc hien.
  • Khong ben nao duoc tiet lo thong tin cho ben thu ba neu khong co su dong y bang van ban cua ben con lai, tru truong hop theo yeu cau cua co quan nha nuoc co tham quyen.
  • Nghia vu bao mat co hieu luc trong suot thoi gian hop dong va [SO_NAM] nam sau khi hop dong cham dut.

docs.title: Dieu 9. So huu tri tue
docs.text:
• Quyen so huu doi voi tai lieu, ma nguon, cau hinh, va san pham ban giao duoc xac dinh theo Phu luc 04 (IP Ownership & License).
  • Cac thanh phan thuoc so huu truoc do cua moi ben van thuoc quyen so huu cua ben do.
  • Ben A duoc quyen su dung san pham ban giao trong pham vi noi bo/doanh nghiep theo thoa thuan.

docs.title: Dieu 10. Bao hanh va ho tro sau ban giao
docs.text:
• Thoi gian bao hanh ky thuat: [SO_NGAY_HOAC_THANG] ke tu ngay ky bien ban ban giao tong the.
  • Noi dung bao hanh: khac phuc loi phat sinh trong pham vi da nghiem thu.
  • Cac yeu cau moi/ngoai pham vi se duoc xu ly theo co che Change Request.

docs.title: Dieu 11. Thay doi pham vi (Change Request)
docs.text:
• Moi thay doi pham vi, tien do, chi phi phai duoc lap thanh van ban (Phu luc/CR) co chu ky dai dien hop le cua hai ben.
  • Ben B chi thuc hien thay doi sau khi hai ben thong nhat bang van ban.

docs.title: Dieu 12. Bat kha khang
docs.text:
• Bat kha khang bao gom cac su kien ngoai kha nang kiem soat hop ly cua cac ben (thien tai, dich benh quy mo lon, chien tranh, thay doi chinh sach nha nuoc...).
  • Ben gap su kien bat kha khang phai thong bao cho ben con lai trong [SO_NGAY] ngay ke tu khi xay ra su kien.
  • Hai ben se thuong luong ke hoach tiep tuc thuc hien hop dong.

docs.title: Dieu 13. Tam ngung, cham dut hop dong
docs.text:
• Mot ben co quyen tam ngung/cham dut hop dong neu ben kia vi pham nghiem trong nghia vu va khong khac phuc trong [SO_NGAY] ngay ke tu khi nhan thong bao bang van ban.
  • Truong hop cham dut, hai ben doi soat khoi luong da thuc hien de thanh toan/hoan tra theo thuc te.

docs.title: Dieu 14. Phat vi pham va boi thuong thiet hai
docs.text:
• Neu mot ben vi pham nghia vu thanh toan/bao mat/tien do gay thiet hai cho ben kia, ben vi pham co trach nhiem boi thuong theo muc thiet hai thuc te, co chung tu hop le.
  • Muc phat vi pham (neu ap dung): [TY_LE_PHAT]% gia tri phan nghia vu bi vi pham, phu hop quy dinh phap luat.

docs.title: Dieu 15. Giai quyet tranh chap
docs.text:
• Moi tranh chap phat sinh duoc uu tien giai quyet bang thuong luong, hoa giai.
  • Neu khong giai quyet duoc trong [SO_NGAY] ngay, tranh chap duoc dua ra Toa an co tham quyen tai [DIA_DIEM] de giai quyet.

docs.title: Dieu 16. Hieu luc hop dong
docs.text:
• Hop dong co hieu luc ke tu ngay ky (hoac ngay [NGAY_HIEU_LUC]) den khi cac ben hoan tat toan bo nghia vu.
  • Hop dong gom [SO_TRANG] trang, lap thanh [SO_BAN] ban co gia tri phap ly nhu nhau, moi ben giu [SO_BAN_MOI_BEN] ban.

DAI DIEN BEN A DAI DIEN BEN B (Ky, ghi ro ho ten, dong dau) (Ky, ghi ro ho ten, dong dau)

docs.title: Phu luc de xuat kem theo hop dong
docs.text:
• Phu luc 01: Scope of Work
  • Phu luc 02: Project Plan & Milestones
  • Phu luc 03: UAT/Acceptance Criteria
  • Phu luc 04: IP Ownership & License
  • Phu luc 05: SLA/SLO va Support Scope (neu co)

Luu y: Day la mau hop dong tham khao cho muc dich thuong mai. De ky chinh thuc, de nghi duoc bo phan phap che/luat su ra soat theo quy dinh hien hanh va dac thu giao dich.

docs.title: HOP DONG DICH VU TRIEN KHAI CHATBOT (RUT GON)
So hop dong: [SO_HD]/[NAM]
docs.text: Hom nay, ngay [NGAY] thang [THANG] nam [NAM], tai [DIA_DIEM], cac ben gom:

docs.title: Ben A (Khach hang)
docs.text:
• Ten don vi:
  • Dai dien:
  • Chuc vu:
  • Dia chi:
  • Ma so thue:
  • Dien thoai:
  • Email:

docs.title: Ben B (Don vi cung cap)
docs.text:
• Ten don vi:
  • Dai dien:
  • Chuc vu:
  • Dia chi:
  • Ma so thue:
  • Dien thoai:
  • Email:

Hai ben thong nhat ky ket hop dong voi noi dung chinh sau:

docs.title: Dieu 1. Doi tuong va pham vi
docs.text:
Ben B cung cap dich vu trien khai chatbot production-ready cho Ben A, bao gom: - Trien khai Price bot + Guide bot theo pham vi da thong nhat; - Ban giao tai lieu van hanh theo goi dich vu (UAT checklist, go-live checklist, risk register, SLA/SLO, runbook incident); - Ho tro nghiem thu va ban giao theo milestone.

Chi tiet pham vi va san pham ban giao duoc quy dinh tai Phu luc 01 (Scope of Work).

docs.title: Dieu 2. Tien do
docs.text:
• Tong thoi gian du kien: [SO_TUAN] tuan, bat dau tu ngay [NGAY_BAT_DAU].
  • Tien do chi tiet theo Phu luc 02 (Milestones).
  • Thay doi pham vi/tien do chi co hieu luc khi co xac nhan bang van ban cua hai ben.

docs.title: Dieu 3. Gia tri hop dong va thanh toan
docs.text:
• Tong gia tri hop dong: [SO_TIEN] VND (Bang chu: [BANG_CHU]).
  • Gia tri tren [chua/da] bao gom VAT.

Lich thanh toan: - Dot 1: 40% khi ky hop dong; - Dot 2: 40% sau khi hoan tat UAT; - Dot 3: 20% sau khi go-live/ban giao.

docs.title: Dieu 4. Nghiem thu va ban giao
docs.text:
• Tieu chi nghiem thu theo Phu luc 03 (Acceptance Criteria).
  • Ben A phan hoi ket qua nghiem thu trong [SO_NGAY] ngay lam viec ke tu khi nhan thong bao nghiem thu.
  • Neu Ben A khong phan hoi dung han, phan ban giao duoc xem la tam chap nhan.

docs.title: Dieu 5. Quyen va nghia vu cua cac ben
5.1 Ben A
docs.text:
• Cung cap thong tin, dau moi nghiep vu, du lieu va phoi hop kiem thu dung tien do.
  • Thanh toan day du, dung han theo Dieu 3.

docs.title: 5.2 Ben B
docs.text:
• Thuc hien dung pham vi, tien do va chat luong theo hop dong.
  • Khac phuc loi phat sinh trong pham vi da nghiem thu theo Dieu 7.

docs.title: Dieu 6. Bao mat va so huu tri tue
docs.text:
• Hai ben cam ket bao mat thong tin trao doi trong qua trinh thuc hien hop dong.
  • Quyen so huu/su dung tai lieu, ma nguon, cau hinh va san pham ban giao duoc quy dinh tai Phu luc 04 (IP & License).

docs.title: Dieu 7. Bao hanh va ho tro
docs.text:
• Thoi gian bao hanh ky thuat: [SO_THANG] thang ke tu ngay ky bien ban ban giao tong the.
  • Bao hanh ap dung cho loi trong pham vi da nghiem thu.
  • Yeu cau ngoai pham vi duoc xu ly theo co che Change Request.

docs.title: Dieu 8. Vi pham, cham dut, va tranh chap
docs.text:
• Ben vi pham nghia vu co trach nhiem khac phuc va boi thuong thiet hai thuc te (neu co).
  • Hop dong co the tam ngung/cham dut neu mot ben vi pham nghiem trong va khong khac phuc trong [SO_NGAY] ngay ke tu khi nhan thong bao.
  • Tranh chap duoc uu tien giai quyet bang thuong luong; neu khong thanh, dua ra Toa an co tham quyen tai [DIA_DIEM].

docs.title: Dieu 9. Hieu luc hop dong
docs.text:
• Hop dong co hieu luc ke tu ngay ky den khi cac ben hoan tat toan bo nghia vu.
  • Hop dong lap thanh [SO_BAN] ban co gia tri phap ly nhu nhau, moi ben giu [SO_BAN_MOI_BEN] ban.

DAI DIEN BEN A DAI DIEN BEN B (Ky, ghi ro ho ten, dong dau) (Ky, ghi ro ho ten, dong dau)

docs.title: Phu luc de xuat
docs.text:
• Phu luc 01: Scope of Work
  • Phu luc 02: Milestones & Timeline
  • Phu luc 03: UAT/Acceptance Criteria
  • Phu luc 04: IP Ownership & License
  • Phu luc 05: SLA/SLO & Support (neu co)

Luu y: Mau rut gon nay dung cho muc dich tham khao va dam phan nhanh. Truoc khi ky chinh thuc, de nghi bo phan phap che/luat su ra soat.

docs.title: MAIL CHAO GIA (OFFERS) - Enterprise Chatbot | AI
1. Mau mail chao gia co ban (VI)
docs.text:
Subject goi y: [Bao gia] Giai phap Chatbot Production-Ready cho [Ten Cong Ty]

Noi dung mail:

Kinh gui Anh/Chi [Ten],

Cam on Anh/Chi da danh thoi gian trao doi ve nhu cau trien khai chatbot cho [Ten Cong Ty].

Ben em gui Anh/Chi bao gia de xuat cho giai phap demo-chatbot theo huong production-ready, bao gom: - Trien khai Price bot + Guide bot - Bo khung van hanh: UAT, go-live checklist, SLA/SLO, risk register, incident runbook - Ho tro trien khai va van hanh theo goi lua chon

Tai lieu dinh kem/de xuat doc: - Bao gia rut gon 1 trang - Bao gia de xuat - Compliance statement (executive)

Neu Anh/Chi dong y, ben em de xuat buoi hop scope 60-90 phut de chot: 1. Goi dich vu phu hop 2. Timeline trien khai 3. KPI nghiem thu va van hanh

Tran trong, [Ten ban] [Chuc danh] [Cong ty] [So dien thoai] | [Email]

docs.title: 2. Mau mail chao gia song ngu
docs.text:
Subject goi y: [Quotation] Production-Ready Chatbot Solution for [Company Name]

Noi dung mail:

Kinh gui Anh/Chi [Ten], Dear [Name],

Cam on Anh/Chi da trao doi ve nhu cau chatbot cho [Ten Cong Ty]. Thank you for discussing your chatbot requirements with us.

Ben em gui bao gia de xuat cho giai phap production-ready, bao gom pham vi ky thuat va governance van hanh. Please find our proposed quotation for a production-ready chatbot solution, including technical scope and operational governance.

Tai lieu tham chieu: Reference documents: - Bao gia rut gon VI-EN - Bao gia VI-EN + USD reference - Compliance statement VI-EN

Neu phu hop, ben em de xuat lich scope meeting 60-90 phut trong tuan nay de chot pham vi, timeline, va KPI. If aligned, we propose a 60-90 minute scoping meeting this week to finalize scope, timeline, and KPIs.

Tran trong / Best regards, [Ten ban / Your Name] [Chuc danh / Title] [Cong ty / Company] [Phone] | [Email]

docs.title: 3. Mau follow-up sau 2-3 ngay
docs.text:
Subject goi y: [Follow-up] Bao gia Chatbot Production-Ready - [Ten Cong Ty]

Noi dung mail:

Kinh gui Anh/Chi [Ten],

Ben em xin follow-up ve bao gia da gui ngay [ngay gui]. Khong biet Anh/Chi da co thoi gian xem qua chua, va minh co can ben em lam ro them phan nao (pham vi, timeline, chi phi, hoac KPI)?

Neu thuan tien, ben em co the sap xep mot buoi 30 phut de trao doi nhanh va chot next step.

Tran trong, [Ten ban]

docs.title: 4. Mau chot meeting tu mail chao gia
docs.text:
Subject goi y: [De xuat lich hop] Chot pham vi trien khai chatbot

Noi dung mail:

Kinh gui Anh/Chi [Ten],

De day nhanh tien do, ben em de xuat buoi hop chot scope theo 2 khung gio: - [Option 1: Thu, ngay, gio] - [Option 2: Thu, ngay, gio]

Noi dung hop: 1. Chot goi dich vu 2. Chot timeline va milestone 3. Chot KPI UAT/go-live 4. Chot owner hai ben

Anh/Chi giup xac nhan khung gio phu hop. Ben em se gui meeting invite ngay.

Tran trong, [Ten ban]

docs.title: 5. Checklist truoc khi gui mail chao gia
docs.text:
• Da gan dung ten khach hang, ten nguoi nhan, va domain bai toan
  • Da chon dung file bao gia (VND hoac VI-EN + USD reference)
  • Da neu ro hieu luc bao gia (30 ngay)
  • Da co CTA ro rang (de xuat lich hop + next step)
  • Da kiem tra chu ky email, so dien thoai, va file dinh kem

Tai lieu dinh kem: - Bao gia rut gon 1 trang

Neu Anh/Chi dong y, ben em de xuat buoi hop 30-45 phut de chot scope cu the va kickoff.

Tran trong, [Ten ban]

docs.title: 2. Goi B - Professional (van hanh noi bo on dinh)
docs.text:
Subject goi y: [Bao gia Goi B] Chatbot Professional cho [Ten Cong Ty]

Noi dung mail:

Kinh gui Anh/Chi [Ten],

Voi muc tieu trien khai chatbot co the van hanh on dinh trong noi bo, ben em de xuat Goi B - Professional.

Pham vi chinh: - Toan bo noi dung Goi A - Bo sung governance va operations docs day du: - Risk register - SLA/SLO - Runbook incident - Benchmark co ban va onboarding team van hanh

Thong tin tom tat: - Timeline: 4-6 tuan - Chi phi: 240,000,000 VND (chua VAT)

Tai lieu dinh kem: - Bao gia rut gon 1 trang - Compliance statement (executive)

Neu phu hop, ben em xin de xuat buoi scope 60 phut de chot KPI UAT/go-live.

docs.text:
Subject goi y: [Bao gia Goi C] Enterprise-Ready Chatbot cho [Ten Cong Ty]

Noi dung mail:

Kinh gui Anh/Chi [Ten],

Neu muc tieu la dua chatbot vao production voi yeu cau governance/reliability cao, ben em de xuat Goi C - Enterprise Readiness.

Pham vi chinh: - Toan bo Goi B - Hardening production (auth, RBAC baseline, audit logging baseline) - Tu van readiness theo control intent ISO 27001/SOC 2 - Ho tro go-live + hypercare 2 tuan

Tai lieu dinh kem: - Bao gia de xuat - Compliance statement (VI) - SLA/SLO

Ben em de xuat buoi hop 60-90 phut voi team business + technical + security de chot scope chi tiet.

Tran trong, [Ten ban]

docs.title: PAYMENT POLICY (CHINH SACH THANH TOAN) - Enterprise Chatbot | AI
1. Muc dich
docs.text: Chinh sach nay quy dinh nguyen tac thanh toan cho cac dich vu lien quan den demo-chatbot, bao gom: - Dich vu trien khai mot lan - Dich vu van hanh/bao tri dinh ky (neu co) - Cac thay doi pham vi (Change Request)

docs.title: 2. Pham vi ap dung
docs.text:
Ap dung cho: - Bao gia, hop dong, phu luc dich vu - Khach hang to chuc/doanh nghiep su dung dich vu

Trong truong hop mau thuan giua chinh sach nay va hop dong da ky, uu tien theo hop dong da ky.

docs.title: 3. Dong tien va thue
docs.text:
• Don vi tien te mac dinh: VND
  • Cac gia tri USD (neu co) chi mang tinh tham khao, tru khi hop dong quy dinh khac.
  • Gia tri dich vu [da/chua] bao gom VAT theo bao gia/hop dong tung thoi diem.

docs.title: 4. Nguyen tac thanh toan de xuat
4.1 Dich vu trien khai mot lan
docs.text: Lich thanh toan tham chieu: - Dot 1: 40% khi ky hop dong - Dot 2: 40% sau UAT sign-off - Dot 3: 20% sau Go-live/ban giao

docs.title: 4.2 Dich vu van hanh dinh ky (neu co)
docs.text:
• Thanh toan theo chu ky thang/quy theo hop dong.
  • Han thanh toan: trong [x] ngay lam viec ke tu ngay xuat hoa don.

docs.title: 4.3 Dich vu thay doi pham vi (CR)
docs.text:
• Moi CR duoc bao gia rieng.
  • Co the ap dung thanh toan 50/50 hoac theo milestone cua CR.

docs.title: 5. Phuong thuc thanh toan
docs.text:
• Chuyen khoan vao tai khoan da dang ky cua ben cung cap.
  • Noi dung chuyen khoan can ghi ro:
  • So hop dong/so hoa don
  • Ten khach hang
  • Dot thanh toan

docs.title: 6. Hoa don va chung tu
docs.text:
• Ben cung cap xuat hoa don/chung tu theo quy dinh phap luat hien hanh.
  • Khach hang co trach nhiem cung cap thong tin xuat hoa don chinh xac.
  • Sai sot thong tin xuat hoa don do ben nao cung cap sai, ben do chiu trach nhiem phoi hop dieu chinh.

docs.title: 7. Cham thanh toan
docs.text: Neu qua han thanh toan: - Ben cung cap co quyen gui thong bao nhac thanh toan. - Sau [x] ngay qua han, ben cung cap co quyen tam ngung mot phan hoac toan bo dich vu (sau khi thong bao bang van ban), tru khi co thoa thuan khac. - Phi cham thanh toan (neu ap dung) duoc quy dinh cu the trong hop dong.

docs.title: 8. Hoan phi va huy dich vu
8.1 Nguyen tac chung
docs.text:
• Cac khoan da thanh toan cho khoi luong da thuc hien hop le thuong khong hoan lai.
  • Hoan phi (neu co) duoc xac dinh dua tren:
  • Khoi luong cong viec da hoan thanh
  • Chi phi da phat sinh
  • Thoa thuan trong hop dong

docs.title: 8.2 Truong hop huy tu phia khach hang
docs.text:
• Khach hang thong bao huy bang van ban.
  • Hai ben doi soat khoi luong da thuc hien de quyet toan.

docs.title: 8.3 Truong hop huy tu phia nha cung cap
docs.text:
• Ben cung cap thong bao ly do va de xuat phuong an xu ly:
  • Tiep tuc voi ke hoach dieu chinh, hoac
  • Quyết toan khoi luong va hoan tra phan chua thuc hien (neu co)

docs.title: 9. Dieu chinh gia
docs.text:
Gia dich vu co the duoc dieu chinh trong cac truong hop: - Thay doi pham vi nghiep vu - Thay doi yeu cau ky thuat/bao mat ngoai pham vi ban dau - Thay doi phap ly/thue phi theo quy dinh moi

Moi dieu chinh gia tri phai duoc xac nhan bang van ban (phu luc/CR).

docs.title: 10. Lien he ho tro thanh toan
docs.text:
Moi van de lien quan thanh toan, hoa don, doi soat: - Email: - Dien thoai: - Dau moi phu trach:

Phien ban: v1.0 Ngay cap nhat: [dd/mm/yyyy]

docs.title: PRIVACY POLICY (CHINH SACH BAO MAT THONG TIN) - Enterprise Chatbot | AI
1. Muc dich
docs.text:
Chinh sach nay mo ta cach [Don vi cung cap] thu thap, su dung, luu tru, va bao ve du lieu khi nguoi dung su dung dich vu demo-chatbot.

Bang viec truy cap hoac su dung dich vu, nguoi dung xac nhan da doc va dong y voi noi dung chinh sach nay.

docs.title: 2. Pham vi ap dung
docs.text: Ap dung cho: - Website/landing page cua dich vu - API chatbot - Cac kenh tiep nhan yeu cau nhu form lead, email, va tai lieu lien quan

docs.title: 3. Loai du lieu co the thu thap
3.1 Du lieu do nguoi dung cung cap
docs.text:
• Ho ten, email, so dien thoai, ten cong ty (neu nguoi dung dien form)
  • Noi dung cau hoi/gui yeu cau
  • Noi dung lien he qua email hoac kenh ho tro

docs.title: 3.2 Du lieu ky thuat tu dong
docs.text:
• Dia chi IP, thiet bi, trinh duyet, thoi diem truy cap
  • Log truy cap/API va thong tin van hanh can thiet
  • Metric hieu nang he thong (latency, error rate, timeout)

docs.title: 4. Muc dich su dung du lieu
docs.text: Du lieu duoc su dung de: - Cung cap va cai tien chat luong dich vu chatbot - Ho tro nguoi dung va xu ly su co van hanh - Bao dam an toan, bao mat, va phong chong truy cap trai phep - Lien he voi khach hang theo yeu cau (demo, bao gia, ho tro) - Dap ung nghia vu phap ly (neu co)

docs.title: 5. Co so phap ly va su dong y
docs.text: Tuy theo boi canh ap dung, viec xu ly du lieu duoc thuc hien tren co so: - Su dong y cua nguoi dung - Nhu cau thuc hien hop dong/dich vu - Nghia vu phap ly - Loi ich hop phap trong van hanh va bao mat he thong

docs.title: 6. Chia se du lieu cho ben thu ba
docs.text:
[Don vi cung cap] khong ban du lieu ca nhan.

Du lieu chi co the duoc chia se trong cac truong hop: - Cho nha cung cap ha tang/dich vu ky thuat phuc vu van hanh (theo hop dong bao mat) - Theo yeu cau cua co quan nha nuoc co tham quyen - Khi can thiet de bao ve quyen va loi ich hop phap cua cac ben

docs.title: 7. Luu tru va thoi han bao quan
docs.text:
• Du lieu duoc luu tru trong thoi gian can thiet cho muc dich da neu tai Chinh sach nay hoac theo yeu cau phap luat.
  • Het thoi han bao quan, du lieu se duoc xoa, an danh hoa, hoac xu ly theo quy dinh noi bo.

docs.title: 8. Bao mat du lieu
docs.text:
[Don vi cung cap] ap dung cac bien phap hop ly de bao ve du lieu, gom: - Ma hoa du lieu truyen tai (HTTPS/TLS) - Kiem soat truy cap theo vai tro (RBAC neu ap dung) - Ghi log va giam sat su co bao mat - Quan ly secret/an toan he thong

Tuy nhien, khong co he thong nao dam bao an toan tuyet doi 100%.

docs.title: 9. Quyen cua chu the du lieu
docs.text:
Tuy theo quy dinh phap luat ap dung, nguoi dung co the co cac quyen: - Quyen duoc biet, truy cap, va yeu cau cap nhat du lieu - Quyen yeu cau xoa/han che xu ly trong mot so truong hop - Quyen rut lai su dong y (neu xu ly dua tren su dong y) - Quyen khieu nai theo co che phap ly hien hanh

Nguoi dung co the lien he theo muc "Thong tin lien he" de thuc hien quyen cua minh.

docs.title: 10. Cookie va cong nghe theo doi
docs.text:
Website co the su dung cookie hoac cong nghe tuong tu de: - Duy tri phien lam viec - Cai thien trai nghiem nguoi dung - Phan tich tong quan luu luong truy cap

Nguoi dung co the dieu chinh cai dat cookie trong trinh duyet.

docs.title: 11. Du lieu tre em
docs.text: Dich vu khong huong den tre em theo quy dinh phap luat ap dung. Neu phat hien thu thap du lieu khong phu hop, [Don vi cung cap] se xu ly xoa bo trong thoi gian hop ly.

docs.title: 12. Chuyen du lieu xuyen bien gioi (neu co)
docs.text: Neu du lieu duoc xu ly/lưu tru ben ngoai lanh tho Viet Nam, [Don vi cung cap] se ap dung bien phap can thiet theo quy dinh phap luat de dam bao muc do bao ve phu hop.

docs.title: 13. Cap nhat chinh sach
docs.text:
[Don vi cung cap] co the cap nhat Chinh sach bao mat theo thoi gian. Phien ban cap nhat se duoc cong bo kem ngay hieu luc.

Nguoi dung tiep tuc su dung dich vu sau khi cap nhat duoc xem la dong y voi noi dung cap nhat.

docs.title: 14. Thong tin lien he
docs.text:
Moi yeu cau lien quan den bao mat du lieu, vui long lien he: - Email: - Dien thoai: - Dia chi:

Phien ban: v1.0 Ngay cap nhat: [dd/mm/yyyy]

docs.title: TERMS OF SERVICE (DIEU KHOAN SU DUNG DICH VU) - Enterprise Chatbot | AI
1. Gioi thieu
docs.text:
Tai lieu nay quy dinh dieu khoan su dung doi voi dich vu demo-chatbot do [Don vi cung cap] van hanh va cung cap.

Bang viec truy cap, dang ky, hoac su dung dich vu, quy khach hang dong y bi rang buoc boi cac dieu khoan trong tai lieu nay.

docs.title: 2. Dinh nghia
docs.text:
• Dich vu: Nen tang chatbot va cac thanh phan lien quan.
  • Nguoi dung: Ca nhan/to chuc truy cap va su dung dich vu.
  • Khach hang: To chuc ky ket hop dong dich vu voi ben cung cap.
  • Noi dung dau vao: Du lieu/cau hoi tai len hoac gui vao he thong.
  • Noi dung dau ra: Cau tra loi/ket qua do he thong tra ve.

docs.title: 3. Pham vi dich vu
docs.text:
Dich vu co the bao gom: - Chatbot hoi dap theo domain nghiep vu (price, guide, hoac domain mo rong) - API truy cap chatbot - Tai lieu van hanh lien quan (tuy theo goi dich vu)

Pham vi chinh xac duoc quy dinh theo hop dong/phu luc ky ket giua cac ben.

docs.title: 4. Dang ky va tai khoan
docs.text:
• Nguoi dung co trach nhiem cung cap thong tin chinh xac khi dang ky.
  • Nguoi dung chiu trach nhiem bao mat thong tin tai khoan/thong tin truy cap.
  • Ben cung cap co quyen tam ngung tai khoan khi phat hien dau hieu su dung trai phep.

docs.title: 5. Quyen va nghia vu cua nguoi dung
docs.text:
Nguoi dung dong y: - Su dung dich vu dung muc dich hop phap. - Khong dua vao he thong noi dung vi pham phap luat, doc hai, hoac xam pham quyen ben thu ba. - Khong co gang truy cap trai phep, tan cong, gay gian doan he thong.

Nguoi dung tu chiu trach nhiem doi voi noi dung dau vao do minh cung cap.

docs.title: 6. Han che su dung bi cam
docs.text: Nghiem cam: - Su dung dich vu de phat tan noi dung trai phap luat. - Dao nguoc, sao chep trai phep, hoac can thiep trai phep vao he thong. - Khai thac lo hong bao mat hoac co tinh gay qua tai. - Su dung dich vu cho muc dich gian lan, lua dao, hoac xam pham quyen rieng tu.

docs.title: 7. Du lieu va quyen rieng tu
docs.text:
• Ben cung cap co the thu thap du lieu van hanh can thiet de dam bao chat luong dich vu.
  • Du lieu duoc xu ly theo chinh sach bao mat va quy dinh phap luat hien hanh.
  • Khach hang cam ket khong gui du lieu nhay cam neu chua co thoa thuan xu ly du lieu phu hop.

docs.title: 8. So huu tri tue
docs.text:
• Tat ca quyen so huu tri tue doi voi nen tang, ma nguon, va tai lieu thuoc ve ben cung cap (tru cac thanh phan duoc thoa thuan khac bang van ban).
  • Khach hang duoc cap quyen su dung trong pham vi hop dong.
  • Nguoi dung khong duoc sao chep, phan phoi, sua doi trai phep.

docs.title: 9. Chat luong dich vu va tu choi bao dam
docs.text:
• Ben cung cap no luc van hanh dich vu on dinh theo SLO/SLA da thoa thuan (neu co).
  • Dich vu duoc cung cap tren nguyen tac "as is" trong pham vi phap luat cho phep.
  • Ben cung cap khong dam bao dich vu hoan toan khong gian doan hoac khong co loi trong moi truong khach quan.

docs.title: 10. Gioi han trach nhiem
docs.text: Trong pham vi phap luat cho phep: - Ben cung cap khong chiu trach nhiem doi voi thiet hai gian tiep, mat loi nhuan, mat du lieu do su dung dich vu sai quy dinh. - Tong muc boi thuong (neu co) khong vuot qua gia tri dich vu da thanh toan trong [12] thang gan nhat, tru khi hop dong quy dinh khac.

docs.title: 11. Tam ngung va cham dut dich vu
docs.text:
Ben cung cap co quyen tam ngung/cham dut dich vu trong cac truong hop: - Nguoi dung vi pham nghiem trong Terms of Service - Co yeu cau tu co quan nha nuoc co tham quyen - Su co bao mat nghiem trong can co lap he thong

Khi cham dut, cac nghia vu thanh toan/noi dung phap ly con ton dong van tiep tuc co hieu luc.

docs.title: 12. Thay doi dieu khoan
docs.text:
• Ben cung cap co the cap nhat Terms of Service theo tung thoi ky.
  • Phien ban cap nhat co hieu luc tu ngay cong bo, tru khi co quy dinh khac.
  • Nguoi dung tiep tuc su dung dich vu sau khi cap nhat dong nghia chap nhan dieu khoan moi.

docs.title: 13. Luat ap dung va giai quyet tranh chap
docs.text:
• Dieu khoan nay duoc dieu chinh boi phap luat Viet Nam (hoac luat ap dung theo hop dong).
  • Tranh chap duoc uu tien giai quyet bang thuong luong.
  • Neu khong thanh, tranh chap duoc dua ra co quan tai phan co tham quyen theo hop dong.

docs.title: 14. Thong tin lien he
docs.text:
Mọi thac mac lien quan den dieu khoan su dung, vui long lien he: - Email: - Dien thoai: - Dia chi:

Phien ban: v1.0 Ngay cap nhat: [dd/mm/yyyy]

docs.text:

docs.title: CASE STUDY - Enterprise Chatbot | AI PRODUCTION-READY
1. Tong quan khach hang
docs.text:
• Nganh: CRM/Sales Operations
  • Quy mo: Doanh nghiep vua (nhieu nhom sales va CS noi bo)
  • Bai toan: Kho tri thuc phan tan, cau hoi lap lai cao, phan hoi khong dong nhat

docs.title: 2. Thach thuc ban dau
docs.text:
Truoc khi trien khai chatbot, khach hang gap 4 van de chinh:

  1. Thoi gian phan hoi cham
    • Team van hanh ton nhieu thoi gian tra loi cau hoi lap lai.
  2. Noi dung khong dong nhat
    • Moi nhan su tra loi theo cach rieng, kho dam bao tinh nhat quan.
  3. Kho mo rong
    • Khi luong cau hoi tang, team support qua tai.
  4. Khong co co che do luong
    • Khong co KPI ro rang de danh gia chatbot co hieu qua hay khong.

docs.title: 3. Muc tieu du an
docs.text:
• Xay dung chatbot hoi dap theo 2 domain:
  • Price bot
  • Guide bot
  • Chuyen tu "demo" sang "production-ready" voi governance day du.
  • Dat duoc KPI ky thuat va KPI nghiep vu toi thieu de van hanh ben vung.

docs.title: 4.1 Kien truc va cong nghe
docs.text:
• Frontend: Vue test UI
  • Backend: FastAPI
  • Retrieval: Semantic search dua tren corpus CSV/Markdown
  • Tracking: MLflow + logs/metrics

docs.title: 4.2 Governance va van hanh
docs.text: Bo khung duoc ap dung: - UAT checklist - Go-live checklist - Risk register - SLA/SLO - Incident runbook P1/P2/P3 - UAT/Go-live sign-off templates

docs.title: 4.3 Lo trinh thuc hien
docs.text:
1. Kickoff va chot scope/KPI
  2. Chuan hoa corpus
  3. Build + integration
  4. Test + UAT
  5. Go-live + hypercare

docs.title: 5.1 Ket qua nghiep vu
docs.text:
• Giam khoi luong cau hoi lap lai do team CS/Sales xu ly thu cong.
  • Tang tinh nhat quan trong tra loi noi bo.
  • Tang toc do phan hoi cho cau hoi co ban.

docs.title: 5.2 Ket qua ky thuat/van hanh
docs.text:
• Co KPI de theo doi chat luong he thong:
  • Uptime
  • p95 latency
  • 5xx error rate
  • quality benchmark
  • Co quy trinh su co va escalation ro rang.
  • Co tai lieu hoan chinh de de handover cho team van hanh.

docs.title: 6. Yeu to thanh cong
docs.text:
• Chot pham vi va out-of-scope tu dau.
  • Co dau moi BA/PO phoi hop lien tuc.
  • Chuan hoa corpus som truoc giai doan UAT.
  • Ky luat sign-off o tung moc (UAT/Go-live).

docs.title: 7. Bai hoc rut ra
docs.text:
1. Chatbot khong chi la model, ma la he thong van hanh.
  2. KPI/SLO can duoc dat ngay tu giai doan planning.
  3. Khong co go-live checklist thi rui ro trien khai tang manh.
  4. Team khach hang va team delivery phai co owner ro rang cho tung action.

docs.title: 8. Huong mo rong tiep theo
docs.text:
• Bo sung hybrid retrieval + re-ranking.
  • Nang cap dashboard quan tri quality theo domain.
  • Tich hop CRM/Helpdesk sau hon.
  • Tang maturity security/compliance readiness theo roadmap.

docs.title: 9. Tai lieu lien quan
docs.text:
• Marketing blog 03 — Case study
  • Customer compliance statement (executive)
  • Project plan Gantt (goi A/B/C)
  • SLA/SLO

docs.title: CASE STUDY CHI TIET (DETAILED) - Enterprise Chatbot | AI
1. Executive Summary
docs.text:
Khach hang can giam tai cho team Sales/CS do khoi luong cau hoi lap lai tang nhanh, trong khi chat luong tra loi khong dong nhat va kho do luong.

Giai phap duoc trien khai theo huong production-ready chatbot: - Price bot + Guide bot - Governance framework day du (UAT, Go-live, SLA/SLO, Risk, Runbook, Sign-off)

Ket qua: he thong duoc dua vao van hanh co kiem soat, co KPI ro rang, va san sang mo rong.

docs.title: 2. Customer Context
docs.text:
• Industry: CRM/Sales Operations
  • Organization size: Mid-size, nhieu nhom Sales/CS noi bo
  • Existing state:
  • Thong tin nghiep vu nam rải rac o tai lieu/ca nhan
  • Tra loi thu cong qua chat/email
  • Chua co bo chi so van hanh chatbot

docs.title: 3.1 Van de nghiep vu
docs.text:
• Thoi gian phan hoi cau hoi lap lai cao
  • Noi dung tra loi khong nhat quan giua cac nhan su
  • Kho bao cao nang suat va chat luong

docs.title: 3.2 Van de ky thuat/van hanh
docs.text:
• Chua co quy trinh UAT/go-live ro rang
  • Chua co SLA/SLO de danh gia he thong
  • Chua co incident process theo muc do uu tien

docs.title: 4.1 Muc tieu chinh
docs.text:
1. Trien khai chatbot hoi dap theo 2 domain (price, guide).
  2. Chuan hoa quy trinh release va van hanh.
  3. Dat nguong KPI toi thieu de du dieu kien production.

docs.title: 4.2 Success criteria (de xuat)
docs.text:
• UAT pass rate >= 95%
  • Khong con loi Sev1 truoc go-live
  • p95 latency <= 2.0s (tai tai trong thiet ke)
  • API 5xx error rate <= 1%
  • Context-grounded answer rate >= 85%

docs.title: 5.1 In-scope
docs.text:
• Backend API cho /chat/price, /chat/guide
  • Frontend test flow
  • Corpus standardization
  • Governance docs va sign-off forms
  • Go-live readiness + hypercare

docs.title: 5.2 Out-of-scope (phase hien tai)
docs.text:
• Full enterprise UI productization
  • Deep integration voi tat ca he thong ben thu ba
  • Official certification audit (ISO/SOC)

docs.title: 6.1 Architecture
docs.text:
• Frontend: Vue UI
  • Backend: FastAPI
  • Knowledge layer: CSV/Markdown corpus
  • Retrieval: semantic search + top_k
  • Observability: logs/metrics + MLflow support

docs.title: 6.2 Governance Stack
docs.text:
• UAT checklist
  • Go-live checklist
  • Risk register
  • SLA/SLO
  • Runbook incident
  • Bien ban UAT sign-off
  • Bien ban Go-live sign-off

docs.title: 7. Delivery Timeline (Reference)
docs.text: Phase Duration Key outputs Kickoff & scope alignment Week 1 Scope baseline, KPI baseline, RACI Build & integration Week 2-3 Working API + retrieval flow Test & UAT Week 4 UAT report + UAT sign-off Go-live readiness Week 5 GO/NO-GO decision pack Hypercare Week 6-7 Stabilization report + closure

docs.title: 8.1 Corpus and Knowledge Preparation
docs.text:
• Gom nhom va lam sach noi dung theo 2 domain
  • Chuan hoa van ban de retrieval tra ve ngu canh sat nhu cau
  • Dat quy trinh cap nhat corpus co owner

docs.title: 8.2 Backend and Retrieval
docs.text:
• Tach endpoint theo domain de de monitor va tune rieng
  • Cau hinh top_k linh hoat de can bang quality/latency
  • Them logging cho cac truong hop timeout/error

docs.title: 8.3 Testing and Validation
docs.text:
• Functional and integration test
  • Performance spot checks
  • Business UAT voi bo cau hoi thuc te

docs.title: 9. Before/After Snapshot (Reference)
docs.text: Chi so Before After (target/observed model) Tra loi lap lai bang tay Cao Giam dang ke Tinh nhat quan cau tra loi Khong dong nhat On dinh theo corpus Co KPI van hanh Gan nhu khong co Co dashboard KPI/SLO Co quy trinh incident Ad-hoc Runbook P1/P2/P3 Readiness go-live Thap Co checklist + sign-off

docs.title: 10. Risks and Mitigations
docs.text: Risk Impact Mitigation Corpus quality khong dong nhat Sai ngu canh Corpus review loop BA + AI KPI khong dat truoc go-live Delay release Tune retrieval + scale + re-test Stakeholder response cham Tre milestone Chot owner + SLA phan hoi Scope creep Vuot timeline/cost CR governance + sign-off scope

docs.title: 11. Operational Outcomes
docs.text:
• Co khung van hanh minh bach de quan tri theo so lieu
  • Co co che quyet dinh GO/NO-GO ro rang
  • Co mau bao cao, sign-off, va policy ho tro ban giao ben vung

docs.title: 12. Lessons Learned
docs.text:
1. Chatbot gia tri cao nhat khi duoc van hanh nhu mot service, khong phai mot demo.
  2. Governance docs can duoc tao song song voi build, khong de den cuoi.
  3. KPI/SLO can chot som de tranh tranh cai o giai doan nghiem thu.

docs.title: 13. Next-Phase Recommendations
docs.text:
• Hybrid retrieval + reranking cho quality cao hon
  • Dashboard quality chi tiet theo domain/intent
  • Tich hop sau hon voi CRM/Helpdesk
  • Nâng cap security maturity theo roadmap (control evidence + readiness audit)

docs.title: 14. Reusable Assets from This Case
docs.text:
• Case study (tom tat)
  • Customer compliance statement (executive)
  • Project plan Gantt (goi A/B/C)
  • Marketing blog 03 — Case study
  • Pitch pack

docs.title: Company profile — Mau ho so doanh nghiep
docs.text: Tai lieu mau: thay noi dung placeholder bang thong tin that truoc khi gui khach hoac xuat PDF.

docs.title: 1. Tong quan doanh nghiep
docs.text:
• Ten cong ty: (dien ten day du)
  • Nam thanh lap: (nam)
  • Linh vuc hoat dong: (vi du: AI Solutions / Software Services / Digital Transformation)
  • Tru so chinh: (dia chi)
  • Website: (URL)
  • Email lien he: (email)
  • So dien thoai: (so dien thoai)

docs.title: Tam nhin
docs.text: Tro thanh doi tac cong nghe tin cay, giup doanh nghiep trien khai AI theo huong an toan, do luong duoc, va mo rong ben vung.

docs.title: Su menh
docs.text:
• Bien cac y tuong AI thanh he thong van hanh thuc te.
  • Giam rui ro trien khai va toi uu gia tri kinh doanh.
  • Dong hanh cung khach hang tu giai doan PoC den production.

docs.title: 3. Nang luc cot loi
docs.text:
• Tu van va trien khai chatbot doanh nghiep
  • Kien truc he thong AI production-ready
  • Governance framework: UAT, Go-live, SLA/SLO, Incident
  • Bao mat va compliance readiness
  • Van hanh va toi uu hieu nang sau go-live

docs.title: 4. Dich vu chinh
docs.text:
1. AI Chatbot Solutions

    • Price bot, guide bot, support bot
    • API-first chatbot architecture

  2. Delivery & Governance

    • Requirement analysis, SDD, BPMN
    • Project planning (Gantt, RACI, sign-off)

  3. Security & Reliability

    • Security baseline, access control, auditability
    • Reliability setup: KPI, SLO, SLA, runbook

  4. Operations & Support

    • Go-live readiness
    • Hypercare and maintenance
    • Incident response and reporting

docs.title: 5. Diem khac biet canh tranh
docs.text:
• Khong chi cung cap "chatbot demo", ma cung cap "chatbot production-ready"
  • Co bo tai lieu day du tu pre-sales -> contract -> go-live -> operation
  • Co framework do luong va governance ro rang de cam ket chat luong
  • Kha nang thich ung theo nhieu maturity level (PoC, internal ops, enterprise)

docs.title: 6. Quy trinh trien khai chuan
docs.text:
1. Assessment & scoping
  2. Architecture & planning
  3. Build & integration
  4. UAT & sign-off
  5. Go-live & hypercare
  6. Ongoing operations & optimization

docs.title: 7. Nganh/nghiep vu phuc vu
docs.text:
• CRM/Sales
  • Customer Service/Helpdesk
  • Internal Knowledge Management
  • Operations Enablement

docs.title: 8. Ho so governance va quality
docs.text: Bo tai lieu da san sang: - UAT checklist - Go-live checklist - Risk register - SLA/SLO policy - Incident runbook - Sign-off templates - Maintenance policy

docs.title: 9. Mo hinh hop tac
docs.text:
• Goi A - Foundation (PoC nhanh)
  • Goi B - Professional (van hanh noi bo)
  • Goi C - Enterprise Readiness (production scale)

Co the tuy chinh theo: - Scope nghiep vu - Muc tieu KPI/SLA - Yeu cau bao mat/compliance - Timeline va ngan sach

docs.text:

  • Email:

docs.title: Ban doc 30 giay
docs.text: Giai phap cua chung toi khong chi la chatbot tra loi, ma la chatbot production-ready kem khung governance day du. He thong duoc van hanh theo thong le ITIL/SRE, co UAT va go-live gate, co SLA/SLO de do luong uptime-latency-error, va co runbook xu ly su co P1/P2/P3. Dieu nay giup khach hang giam rui ro khi trien khai, tang do tin cay van hanh, va san sang mo rong theo chuan doanh nghiep.

docs.title: One-liner chot
docs.text: Khong chi demo duoc, ma van hanh duoc - on dinh, do luong duoc, va kiem soat duoc.

docs.title: ELEVATOR PITCH 30 GIAY - TECHNICAL BUYER TONE (CTO/CISO)
Ban doc 30 giay
docs.text: Giai phap chatbot nay duoc thiet ke theo huong production reliability va security governance ngay tu dau. Chung toi van hanh theo SRE model voi SLI/SLO/SLA ro rang, error budget, va incident runbook P1/P2/P3 de kiem soat MTTR. Ve bao mat va auditability, he thong can chinh theo ISO 27001/SOC 2 control intent: auth, RBAC, secret management, logging, va audit trail. Ket qua la mot chatbot co the scale trong enterprise ma van giu duoc tinh on dinh, kha nang truy vet, va readiness cho compliance maturity cao hon.

docs.title: One-liner chot
docs.text: Day la mot AI service co operational controls day du, khong phai mot chatbot demo khong governance.

docs.title: Cau tra loi nhanh cho CTO/CISO
docs.text:
• CTO hoi: "Lam sao dam bao reliability khi tai tang?" Dap: "Theo doi SLO latency/error, dung error budget governance, va scale ngang backend theo nguong canh bao."

  • CISO hoi: "Muc do san sang compliance nhu the nao?" Dap: "Da can chinh control intent theo ISO 27001/SOC 2 (access, logging, audit, incident). Co the mo rong sang readiness assessment/chung nhan khi can."

  • CTO/CISO hoi: "Neu su co nghiem trong?" Dap: "Kich hoat runbook P1, co SLA phan hoi, rollback criteria, va RCA bat buoc sau su co de ngan tai dien."

docs.title: ELEVATOR PITCH 30 GIAY - FORMAL VA SALES
Ban doc 30 giay
docs.text: Giai phap chatbot cua chung toi duoc thiet ke theo huong production-ready, ket hop day du cac thanh phan governance va operations control. Mo hinh van hanh can chinh theo ITIL/SRE, bao gom UAT gate, go-live gate, SLA/SLO, va incident runbook theo cap do P1/P2/P3. Cach tiep can nay giup to chuc giam rui ro trien khai, nang cao do tin cay dich vu, va dam bao kha nang mo rong ben vung trong moi truong doanh nghiep.

docs.title: One-liner chot
docs.text: Khong chi cung cap chatbot, chung toi cung cap khung van hanh co kiem soat cho production.

docs.title: Ban doc 30 giay
docs.text: Ban khong can them mot chatbot demo, ban can mot chatbot co the vao production an toan. Chung toi dong goi san UAT, go-live checklist, SLA/SLO, va runbook su co de he thong van hanh on dinh ngay tu dau. Ket qua la giam rui ro go-live, tang toc do trien khai, va tao niem tin cho khach hang voi cac chi so do luong ro rang.

docs.title: One-liner chot
docs.text: Demo thi ai cung lam duoc, production-ready co kiem soat moi la khac biet.

docs.title: 1. Muc dich tai lieu
docs.text:
Tai lieu nay mo ta khung quan tri van hanh cho demo-chatbot theo thong le quoc te, nham dam bao he thong co the trien khai doanh nghiep theo huong:

  • Co the kiem soat rui ro
  • Co the do luong chat luong dich vu
  • Co the xu ly su co nhanh va minh bach

docs.title: 2. Khung chuan tham chieu
docs.text:
Giai phap duoc xay dung theo huong phu hop voi cac khung chuan pho bien:

  • ITIL/ITSM practices: Incident, Change, Release readiness
  • SRE practices: SLI/SLO/SLA, error budget, reliability operations
  • ISO 27001/SOC 2 control intent: access control, logging, auditability, incident response
  • ISO 31000 risk management intent: nhan dien, danh gia, giam thieu rui ro
  • QA/UAT governance practices: tieu chi pass/fail, nghiem thu co bang chung

Luu y: Day la muc do can chinh theo best practices, khong mac dinh la chung nhan ISO/SOC chinh thuc.

docs.title: 3. Cac van de doanh nghiep duoc giai quyet
docs.text:
• Rui ro go-live cao
  • Giai quyet bang go-live checklist va rollback criteria ro rang
  • Kho do luong chat luong chatbot
  • Giai quyet bang SLA/SLO (latency, error rate, quality targets)
  • Xu ly su co cham, phan tan
  • Giai quyet bang Runbook incident (P1/P2/P3, timeline, ownership)
  • Thieu minh bach rui ro van hanh
  • Giai quyet bang Risk register (risk level, warning signs, mitigation)
  • Nghiem thu khong dong nhat
  • Giai quyet bang UAT checklist (business criteria + technical criteria)

docs.title: 4. Pham vi ap dung
docs.text:
Pham vi tai lieu hien tai bao phu:

  • Quan tri release truoc production
  • Quan tri van hanh production theo SLA/SLO
  • Quan tri su co va cai tien sau su co
  • Quan tri rui ro va kiem thu nghiep vu

Khong nam trong pham vi mac dinh:

  • Chung nhan compliance chinh thuc boi ben thu ba
  • Danh gia phap ly nganh dac thu (tai chinh/y te/du lieu nhay cam cao)

docs.title: 5. Cam ket van hanh de xuat voi khach hang
docs.text:
• Co checklist UAT va go-live truoc moi phien ban production
  • Co bo chi so van hanh (SLO) va muc cam ket dich vu (SLA) ro rang
  • Co quy trinh ung pho su co theo cap do uu tien va thoi gian phan hoi
  • Co co che theo doi va cap nhat rui ro dinh ky
  • Co tai lieu onboarding van hanh de dam bao tinh lien tuc nhan su

docs.title: 6. Gia tri cho khach hang
docs.text:
• Giam rui ro khi trien khai chatbot vao quy trinh that
  • Tang do tin cay va kha nang mo rong dich vu
  • Tang minh bach trong bao cao van hanh va su co
  • Rut ngan thoi gian khac phuc khi phat sinh loi
  • Tao nen tang de tien toi cac muc tuan thu cao hon trong tuong lai

docs.title: 7. Muc do xu huong thi truong (trending)
docs.text:
Cach tiep can nay phu hop xu huong trien khai AI doanh nghiep 2024-2026:

  • Governance-first cho ung dung GenAI/LLM
  • Reliability va observability la dieu kien truoc khi scale
  • Security-by-design va auditability tro thanh yeu cau trong mua sam doanh nghiep
  • Chuan hoa operational runbook de giam phu thuoc vao ca nhan

docs.title: 8. Lo trinh nang cap tuan thu tiep theo (de xuat)
docs.text:
Neu khach hang can muc compliance cao hon, co the mo rong theo lo trinh:

  1. Gap analysis theo ISO 27001/SOC 2 controls
  2. Bo sung bang chung kiem soat (evidence collection)
  3. Chuan hoa chinh sach bao mat va quy trinh thay doi
  4. Thuc hien internal audit va readiness assessment
  5. Lam viec voi ben danh gia doc lap (neu can chung nhan)

docs.title: 1. Muc dich tai lieu / Document Purpose
docs.text: VI: Tai lieu nay mo ta khung quan tri van hanh cho demo-chatbot theo thong le quoc te, nham dam bao he thong co the trien khai doanh nghiep voi muc do kiem soat cao. EN: This document describes the operational governance framework for demo-chatbot, aligned with international best practices to support enterprise-grade deployment and control.

docs.title: 2. Khung chuan tham chieu / Reference Frameworks
docs.text:
VI: Giai phap duoc xay dung theo huong phu hop voi cac khung chuan pho bien:

  • ITIL/ITSM practices (Incident, Change, Release readiness)
  • SRE practices (SLI/SLO/SLA, error budget, reliability operations)
  • ISO 27001/SOC 2 control intent (access control, logging, auditability, incident response)
  • ISO 31000 risk management intent (risk identification, assessment, mitigation)
  • QA/UAT governance practices (pass/fail criteria with evidence)

EN: The solution is designed to align with commonly adopted frameworks:

  • ITIL/ITSM practices (Incident, Change, Release readiness)
  • SRE practices (SLI/SLO/SLA, error budget, reliability operations)
  • ISO 27001/SOC 2 control intent (access control, logging, auditability, incident response)
  • ISO 31000 risk management intent (risk identification, assessment, mitigation)
  • QA/UAT governance practices (pass/fail criteria with evidence)

VI: Luu y day la muc do can chinh theo best practices, khong mac dinh la chung nhan ISO/SOC chinh thuc. EN: Note: this reflects best-practice alignment and does not by default constitute official ISO/SOC certification.

docs.title: 3. Van de duoc giai quyet / Problems Addressed
docs.text:
VI:

  • Rui ro go-live cao -> giai quyet bang go-live checklist va rollback criteria ro rang
  • Kho do luong chat luong chatbot -> giai quyet bang SLA/SLO
  • Xu ly su co cham, phan tan -> giai quyet bang Runbook incident
  • Thieu minh bach rui ro van hanh -> giai quyet bang Risk register
  • Nghiem thu khong dong nhat -> giai quyet bang UAT checklist

EN:

  • High go-live risk -> mitigated through go-live checklist and explicit rollback criteria
  • Difficult chatbot quality measurement -> addressed via SLA/SLO
  • Slow or fragmented incident response -> standardized in Runbook incident
  • Limited risk transparency -> formalized in Risk register
  • Inconsistent acceptance testing -> standardized in UAT checklist

docs.title: 4. Pham vi ap dung / Scope
docs.text:
VI: Pham vi hien tai bao phu:

  • Release governance truoc production
  • Production operations theo SLA/SLO
  • Incident response va post-incident improvement
  • Risk management va business UAT governance

EN: Current scope covers:

  • Pre-production release governance
  • Production operations based on SLA/SLO
  • Incident response and post-incident improvement
  • Risk management and business UAT governance

VI: Ngoai pham vi mac dinh:

  • Chung nhan compliance chinh thuc boi ben thu ba
  • Danh gia phap ly nganh dac thu (tai chinh/y te/du lieu nhay cam cao)

EN: Out of default scope:

  • Formal third-party compliance certification
  • Industry-specific legal assessments (e.g., finance, healthcare, highly sensitive data)

docs.title: 5. Cam ket van hanh de xuat / Proposed Operational Commitments
docs.text:
VI:

  • Co checklist UAT va go-live truoc moi release production
  • Co SLO (technical objective) va SLA (service commitment) ro rang
  • Co incident response process theo muc do uu tien
  • Co risk review dinh ky va owner ro rang
  • Co onboarding operations docs de dam bao continuity

EN:

  • UAT and go-live checklists are enforced before each production release
  • Clear SLOs (technical objectives) and SLAs (service commitments) are defined
  • Incident response process is prioritized by severity levels
  • Periodic risk reviews with explicit ownership are maintained
  • Operations onboarding documentation ensures team continuity

docs.title: 6. Gia tri cho khach hang / Customer Value
docs.text:
VI:

  • Giam rui ro trien khai chatbot vao quy trinh thuc te
  • Tang do tin cay va kha nang mo rong
  • Tang tinh minh bach trong van hanh va xu ly su co
  • Rut ngan thoi gian khac phuc (lower MTTR)
  • Tao nen tang de tien toi compliance maturity cao hon

EN:

  • Reduces deployment risk for production chatbot workflows
  • Improves reliability and scalability
  • Increases transparency in operations and incident handling
  • Reduces recovery time (lower MTTR)
  • Establishes a foundation for higher compliance maturity

docs.title: 7. Xu huong thi truong / Market Trend
docs.text:
VI: Cach tiep can nay phu hop xu huong AI enterprise 2024-2026:

  • Governance-first for GenAI/LLM applications
  • Reliability and observability as preconditions for scaling
  • Security-by-design and auditability in enterprise procurement
  • Standardized runbooks to reduce person-dependent operations

EN: This approach aligns with 2024-2026 enterprise AI trends:

  • Governance-first for GenAI/LLM applications
  • Reliability and observability as scaling prerequisites
  • Security-by-design and auditability in enterprise procurement
  • Standardized runbooks to reduce person-dependent operations

docs.title: 8. Lo trinh nang cap compliance / Compliance Maturity Roadmap
docs.text:
VI:

  1. Gap analysis theo ISO 27001/SOC 2 controls
  2. Bo sung evidence collection cho controls
  3. Chuan hoa security/change management policies
  4. Internal audit va readiness assessment
  5. Danh gia boi don vi doc lap (neu can certification)

EN:

  1. Perform gap analysis against ISO 27001/SOC 2 controls
  2. Establish control evidence collection
  3. Standardize security and change management policies
  4. Conduct internal audit and readiness assessment
  5. Engage independent assessors (if certification is required)

docs.title: Muc tieu
docs.text: demo-chatbot duoc thiet ke de trien khai chatbot doanh nghiep theo huong governance-first: do duoc chat luong, kiem soat rui ro, va van hanh on dinh o production.

docs.title: Vi sao khach hang nen quan tam
docs.text:
• Giam rui ro khi dua chatbot vao quy trinh thuc te.
  • Co cam ket van hanh ro rang thay vi chi “demo chay duoc”.
  • Co co che xu ly su co nhanh, minh bach va co truy vet.
  • Tao nen tang de mo rong quy mo va nang cap compliance sau nay.

docs.title: Khung chuan tham chieu
docs.text:
• ITIL/ITSM practices (incident, release readiness)
  • SRE practices (SLI/SLO/SLA, error budget)
  • ISO 27001/SOC 2 control intent (security, logging, auditability)
  • ISO 31000 risk management intent
  • QA/UAT governance practices

Luu y: Day la huong can chinh theo best practices, khong mac dinh la chung nhan chinh thuc.

docs.title: Van de duoc giai quyet
docs.text:
• Go-live rui ro cao -> co go-live checklist + rollback criteria
  • Kho do chat luong chatbot -> co SLA/SLO + metric ro rang
  • Xu ly su co cham -> co Runbook incident (P1/P2/P3)
  • Thieu minh bach rui ro -> co Risk register (owner + mitigation)
  • Nghiem thu khong dong nhat -> co UAT checklist (pass/fail)

docs.title: Cam ket van hanh de xuat
docs.text:
• Moi release production deu qua UAT va go-live checklist.
  • Co SLO ky thuat va SLA dich vu duoc thong nhat.
  • Co quy trinh incident response theo muc do uu tien.
  • Co review rui ro dinh ky va cap nhat owner/action.
  • Co bo tai lieu onboarding de giam phu thuoc ca nhan.

docs.title: KPI production de xuat
docs.text:
• Uptime: >= 99.9% / thang
  • API error rate (5xx): <= 1%
  • p95 latency: <= 2.0s (tai tai trong thiet ke)
  • Ti le cau tra loi dung ngu canh (benchmark noi bo): >= 85%

docs.title: Xu huong thi truong (2024-2026)
docs.text:
• Enterprise AI mua theo tieu chi governance va auditability, khong chi theo demo.
  • Reliability/observability tro thanh dieu kien bat buoc truoc khi scale.
  • Security-by-design va incident readiness la diem cong lon trong pre-sales.

docs.title: Thong diep chot voi khach hang
docs.text: Giai phap nay khong chi cung cap chatbot, ma cung cap khung van hanh va kiem soat de chatbot co the di duong dai trong moi truong doanh nghiep.

  • Thieu tieu chi do luong chat luong, do on dinh va xu ly su co.

  • Chuan hoa UAT, go-live, risk, SLA/SLO, va incident response.

  • SRE practices cho SLI/SLO/SLA va error budget.

  • API 5xx error rate: <= 1%.
  • p95 latency: <= 2.0s (tai tai trong thiet ke).
  • Ti le cau tra loi dung ngu canh: >= 85%.

docs.title: Slide 7 - Gia tri cho khach hang
docs.text:
• Giam rui ro khi dua chatbot vao quy trinh thuc te.
  • Tang do tin cay va kha nang mo rong doanh nghiep.
  • Tang kha nang kiem toan, bao cao, va truy vet su co.

  • Reliability/observability la dieu kien truoc khi scale.

docs.text:

  • Day la chatbot kem khung van hanh production-ready.

docs.title: Slide 1 - Van de cua doanh nghiep / Enterprise Problem
docs.text:

  • VI: Khach hang can bang chung van hanh, khong chi tinh nang.

docs.title: Slide 2 - Giai phap de xuat / Proposed Solution
docs.text:

  • EN: Deploy chatbot with built-in governance and operations readiness.

docs.text:

  • VI/EN: SRE practices (SLI/SLO/SLA, error budget)
  • VI/EN: ISO 27001/SOC 2 control intent (security, logging, auditability)
  • VI/EN: ISO 31000 risk management intent

docs.title: Slide 4 - Van de duoc giai quyet / Problems Solved
docs.text:
• VI: Giam rui ro go-live bang checklist + rollback criteria. EN: Reduce go-live risk via checklists and rollback criteria.
  • VI: Rut ngan MTTR bang runbook P1/P2/P3. EN: Shorten MTTR with P1/P2/P3 incident runbooks.
  • VI: Dong nhat nghiem thu bang UAT pass/fail criteria. EN: Standardize acceptance with clear UAT pass/fail criteria.

docs.text:

  • VI/EN: API 5xx error rate <= 1%

docs.title: TALK TRACK 2 PHUT - CUSTOMER COMPLIANCE PITCH
Muc tieu
docs.text: Ban script nay dung cho tinh huong pitch nhanh 2 phut voi stakeholder, tap trung vao 4 y: van de, giai phap, gia tri, va thong diep chot.

docs.title: Script 2 phut (goi y doc lien mach)
docs.text:
Hien nay nhieu chatbot demo chay duoc, nhung khi vao production thuong gap van de: khong do duoc chat luong, khong co quy trinh xu ly su co ro rang, va khong co bang chung van hanh de khach hang tin tuong.

Giai phap cua chung toi khong chi la chatbot, ma la chatbot kem khung governance va operations readiness. Bo khung nay gom UAT checklist, go-live checklist, risk register, SLA/SLO, va incident runbook P1/P2/P3.

Nho do, moi release production deu co gate kiem soat, co rollback criteria, co metric theo doi nhu uptime, latency, error rate va quality, dong thoi co quy trinh ung pho su co de rut ngan thoi gian phuc hoi.

Gia tri cho khach hang la giam rui ro khi go-live, tang do tin cay van hanh, tang minh bach audit, va tao nen tang mo rong ben vung.

Thong diep chot: day khong chi la chatbot tinh nang, day la chatbot production-ready kem khung kiem soat theo thong le quoc te, phu hop xu huong governance-first trong AI doanh nghiep.

docs.title: 3 cau tra loi nhanh khi bi hoi tiep
docs.text:
• Hoi: "Thuoc chuan gi?" Dap: "Can chinh theo ITIL/ITSM, SRE, ISO 27001/SOC 2 control intent, va ISO 31000 risk management."

  • Hoi: "Do duoc bang gi?" Dap: "Bang SLA/SLO va KPI production: uptime, p95 latency, 5xx error rate, va quality benchmark."

  • Hoi: "Neu co su co thi sao?" Dap: "Da co runbook P1/P2/P3, co SLA phan hoi, rollback criteria, va RCA sau su co."

docs.title: TALK TRACK 5 PHUT - CUSTOMER COMPLIANCE PITCH
Huong dan su dung
docs.text:
• Tong thoi luong: 5 phut
  • So slide: 9
  • Cach noi: ngan, ro, tap trung vao gia tri kinh doanh + do tin cay van hanh

docs.title: Slide 1 - Enterprise Problem (30s)
docs.text: Thong diep chinh: Demo chatbot khong du de vao production. Script goi y: "Phan lon chatbot co the demo rat nhanh, nhung khi vao production thi phat sinh 3 van de lon: khong do duoc chat luong, khong co quy trinh xu ly su co, va khong co bang chung van hanh de khach hang tin tuong."

docs.title: Slide 2 - Proposed Solution (35s)
docs.text: Thong diep chinh: Chung toi ban giao chatbot kem khung van hanh. Script goi y: "Giai phap cua chung toi khong chi la chatbot tra loi, ma la chatbot kem bo khung governance: UAT, go-live gate, risk register, SLA/SLO va runbook incident. Nghia la he thong co the release, van hanh va cai tien mot cach co kiem soat."

docs.title: Slide 3 - Reference Frameworks (30s)
docs.text: Thong diep chinh: Can chinh theo thong le quoc te. Script goi y: "Mo hinh nay duoc can chinh theo ITIL/ITSM cho van hanh dich vu, SRE cho do tin cay, ISO 27001/SOC 2 control intent cho bao mat va auditability, va ISO 31000 cho quan tri rui ro."

docs.title: Slide 4 - Problems Solved (35s)
docs.text: Thong diep chinh: Moi van de deu co co che xu ly ro rang. Script goi y: "Go-live rui ro cao duoc giai quyet bang checklist va rollback criteria. Incident duoc xu ly theo cap do P1/P2/P3 de giam MTTR. Nghiem thu duoc chuan hoa bang tieu chi pass/fail de tranh tranh cai ve cam tinh."

docs.title: Slide 5 - Operational Commitments (35s)
docs.text: Thong diep chinh: Co cam ket van hanh cu the, khong mo ho. Script goi y: "Moi release production deu di qua UAT va go-live gate. He thong co SLA/SLO ro rang cho uptime, latency va error rate. Cac rui ro duoc review dinh ky va co owner cu the cho moi hanh dong khac phuc."

docs.title: Slide 6 - Production KPIs (35s)
docs.text: Thong diep chinh: Thanh cong duoc do bang so lieu. Script goi y: "Chi so muc tieu production gom: uptime tu 99.9%, ty le loi 5xx duoi 1%, p95 latency duoi 2 giay, va ty le cau tra loi dung ngu canh tu 85% tro len. Day la nen tang de quan tri theo du lieu, khong theo cam nhan."

docs.title: Slide 7 - Customer Value (30s)
docs.text: Thong diep chinh: Loi ich truc tiep cho khach hang. Script goi y: "Khach hang nhan duoc 3 gia tri ro rang: giam rui ro khi vao production, tang do tin cay dich vu, va tang minh bach trong bao cao van hanh va xu ly su co. Dieu nay giup he thong di duong dai, khong dung lai o muc demo."

docs.title: Slide 8 - Market Trend (30s)
docs.text: Thong diep chinh: Day la huong di phu hop xu huong thi truong. Script goi y: "Tu 2024 den 2026, enterprise AI dang chuyen sang governance-first. Nghia la muon scale thi phai co reliability, observability, security-by-design va auditability. Day chinh la ly do bo tai lieu van hanh nay tro thanh diem cong trong pre-sales."

docs.title: Slide 9 - Closing Message (20s)
docs.text: Thong diep chinh: Khac biet cua giai phap. Script goi y: "Thong diep cuoi cung: day khong chi la chatbot, day la chatbot production-ready kem khung van hanh va kiem soat. Muc tieu la on dinh, do luong duoc, va mo rong ben vung cho doanh nghiep."

docs.title: Q&A du phong (neu con 1-2 phut)
docs.text:
• Hoi: "Day co phai chung nhan ISO/SOC chua?" Tra loi: "Hien tai la can chinh theo control intent va best practices; co the mo rong lo trinh de danh gia/chung nhan chinh thuc neu khach hang yeu cau."

  • Hoi: "Bao lau de vao production?" Tra loi: "Tuy pham vi, nhung voi bo tai lieu governance co san, thoi gian go-live va rui ro trien khai giam dang ke so voi cach lam chi tap trung vao code."

  • Hoi: "Neu he thong loi thi sao?" Tra loi: "Da co runbook P1/P2/P3, SLA phan hoi, rollback criteria, va RCA sau su co de dam bao phuc hoi nhanh va cai tien lien tuc."

docs.title: 1. Muc dich
docs.text:
Tai lieu nay dung de chuan hoa thong tin khach hang trong qua trinh: - Pre-sales - Scope workshop - Kickoff va trien khai

Muc tieu la dam bao team hieu dung bai toan, dung nguoi dung, dung KPI.

docs.text:

  • Nganh:
  • Quy mo (nhan su/chi nhanh):
  • Thi truong muc tieu:
  • Dau moi lien he chinh:
  • Cac stakeholder lien quan:

docs.title: 3.1 Hien trang
docs.text:
• Quy trinh hoi dap hien tai dang duoc thuc hien nhu the nao?
  • Van de lon nhat trong van hanh thong tin la gi?
  • Cac kenh nguoi dung hien dang tuong tac (web, Zalo, CRM, helpdesk)?

docs.title: 3.2 Pain points chinh

  • Noi dung khong dong nhat
  • Khong do duoc chat luong
  • Kho mo rong theo quy mo nguoi dung

docs.title: 4. Muc tieu kinh doanh cua khach hang
docs.text:
• Muc tieu 1:
  • Muc tieu 2:
  • Muc tieu 3:

Mau tham chieu: - Giam thoi gian tra loi cau hoi lap lai - Tang chat luong thong tin phan hoi - Tang do tin cay khi dua vao production

docs.title: 5. Nhom nguoi dung muc tieu
docs.text: Nhom nguoi dung Nhu cau chinh Muc uu tien Sales/CS noi bo Hoi dap nhanh ve gia/huong dan Cao Quan ly van hanh Theo doi KPI va tinh on dinh Cao IT/Ops De trien khai, de bao tri Trung binh

docs.title: 6. Yeu cau khach hang theo nhom
6.1 Yeu cau nghiep vu
docs.text:

  • Co khuyen nghi hanh dong tiep theo (neu can)

docs.title: 6.2 Yeu cau ky thuat

  • Tich hop de dang
  • Co monitoring va alerting

docs.title: 6.3 Yeu cau bao mat/compliance

  • Bao ve du lieu nhay cam
  • Audit trail va incident response

docs.title: KPI nghiep vu
docs.text:

  • Muc do hai long nguoi dung noi bo
  • Ty le giam tai cho team support

docs.title: KPI ky thuat
docs.text:
• Uptime
  • p95 latency
  • 5xx error rate
  • MTTR

docs.title: 8. Muc do san sang (readiness) cua khach hang
docs.text: Nhom Trang thai hien tai Ghi chu Du lieu/corpus [Ready/Partial/Not ready] Team nghiep vu [Ready/Partial/Not ready] Team IT/Ops [Ready/Partial/Not ready] Governance process [Ready/Partial/Not ready]

docs.title: 9. Rui ro tu phia khach hang (project risk input)
docs.text:
• Dau moi nghiem thu khong co lich ro rang
  • Corpus chua day du/chua chuan hoa
  • Ky vong scope vuot qua pham vi goi da chot

Huong giam thieu: - Chot owner + deadline ngay kickoff - Chuan hoa scope va out-of-scope - Dat ky review dinh ky theo sprint/tuan

docs.title: 10. Ke hoach engagement de xuat
docs.text:
1. Discovery workshop 60-90 phut
  2. Scope & KPI alignment
  3. Proposal + package mapping (A/B/C)
  4. Kickoff va trien khai theo gantt
  5. UAT sign-off -> Go-live sign-off

docs.title: 11. Mau tom tat customer profile 1 trang
docs.text:
• Customer:
  • Industry:

  • Top 3 goals:

docs.text:
• Company profile
  • Team profile
  • Meeting template 15 phut

docs.title: 1. Muc tieu buoi hop
docs.text:
• Xac dinh nhu cau thuc te cua khach hang ve chatbot production-ready.
  • Lam ro pain point ve go-live risk, reliability, security, va governance.
  • Chot duoc next step cu the sau buoi hop.

docs.title: 2. Agenda 15 phut (goi y)
docs.text:
• 0:00 - 1:00 | Mo dau va align muc tieu
  • 1:00 - 4:00 | Hoi nhanh ve hien trang va pain point
  • 4:00 - 8:00 | Trinh bay giai phap va khung governance
  • 8:00 - 11:00 | Mapping nhu cau khach hang -> gia tri de xuat
  • 11:00 - 13:00 | Q&A ngắn
  • 13:00 - 15:00 | Chot next step, owner, timeline

docs.title: 3. Script mo dau 60 giay
docs.text: "Cam on anh/chi da danh thoi gian. Muc tieu buoi nay la hieu ro bai toan chatbot cua anh/chi trong production, sau do doi chieu voi mot mo hinh trien khai co governance day du: UAT, go-live gate, SLA/SLO, risk control, va incident response. Cuoi buoi minh se chot duoc next step ro rang de danh gia nhanh tinh kha thi."

docs.title: A. Hien trang
docs.text:
• Hien tai chatbot dang o giai doan nao: y tuong, PoC, hay da production?
  • Team dang gap van de lon nhat la gi: chat luong, toc do, hay bao mat?
  • Co KPI nao dang duoc theo doi cho chatbot khong?

docs.title: B. Van hanh va reliability
docs.text:
• Neu chatbot loi, hien tai team xu ly theo quy trinh nao?
  • Da co SLA/SLO noi bo hoac cam ket voi nguoi dung chua?
  • Co do duoc latency, error rate, va ty le tra loi dung ngu canh khong?

docs.title: C. Bao mat va compliance
docs.text:
• Yeu cau security/compliance cua don vi la muc nao?
  • Co can audit trail, RBAC, SSO, hoac quy trinh incident reporting khong?

docs.title: D. Quyet dinh va timeline
docs.text:
• Ai la stakeholder chinh trong quyet dinh trien khai?
  • Moc thoi gian ky vong de go-live la khi nao?

docs.title: 5. Mapping pain point -> thong diep de xuat
docs.text:
• Neu khach hang lo rui ro go-live:
  • Nhan manh go-live checklist + rollback criteria
  • Neu khach hang lo downtime/latency:
  • Nhan manh SLA/SLO + runbook P1/P2/P3
  • Neu khach hang lo audit/compliance:
  • Nhan manh Risk register + control intent ISO/SOC
  • Neu khach hang lo nghiem thu:
  • Nhan manh UAT checklist + pass/fail criteria ro rang

docs.title: 6. Q&A ngan (goi y)
docs.text:
• "Thuoc chuan gi?"
  • "Can chinh theo ITIL/ITSM, SRE, ISO 27001/SOC 2 control intent, va ISO 31000."
  • "Lam sao chung minh hieu qua?"
  • "Bang KPI production: uptime, p95 latency, 5xx error rate, quality benchmark."
  • "Neu co su co nghiem trong?"
  • "Co runbook P1/P2/P3, SLA phan hoi, rollback criteria, va RCA sau su co."

docs.title: 7. Chot next step (2 phut cuoi)
docs.text:
• De xuat next step muc 1 (nhanh):
  • Workshop 60-90 phut de gap analysis hien trang
  • De xuat next step muc 2 (trung binh):
  • Mini-assessment 1-2 tuan, tra ket qua readiness + roadmap
  • De xuat next step muc 3 (day du):
  • Pilot co KPI va acceptance criteria de san sang production

Mau chot: "Neu anh/chi dong y, buoc tiep theo minh de xuat la [workshop/assessment/pilot], thoi gian [x], dau ra [y], va 2 ben cung thong nhat owner de trien khai ngay trong tuan nay."

docs.title: 8. Meeting notes template (dien nhanh)
docs.text:
• Ngay hop:
  • Thanh phan:
  • Pain point chinh:
  • Muc uu tien cua khach hang:
  • Constraint (bao mat/ngan sach/timeline):
  • KPI muc tieu:
  • Next step da chot:
  • Owner ben khach hang:
  • Owner ben minh:
  • Han hoan thanh:

docs.title: PITCH PACK - Enterprise Chatbot | AI COMPLIANCE
1. Muc dich
docs.text: Tai lieu nay tong hop cac phien ban pitch de su dung nhanh theo tung doi tuong khach hang: business, executive, ky thuat, va quoc te.

docs.title: 2. Danh sach pitch hien co
docs.text:
• Elevator pitch 30s
  • Elevator pitch — bien the
  • 2 bien the: Formal tone va Sales tone
  • Elevator pitch — technical buyer
  • Bien the danh cho CTO/CISO
  • Talk track 2 phut
  • Script 2 phut + Q&A nhanh
  • Talk track 5 phut
  • Script 5 phut theo 9 slide + Q&A du phong
  • Compliance statement (executive)
  • Executive summary 1 trang
  • Compliance statement (slide-ready VI)
  • Slide-ready (VI) theo tung slide
  • Compliance statement (slide-ready VI-EN)
  • Slide-ready song ngu VI-EN
  • Compliance statement
  • Compliance statement song ngu VI-EN day du
  • Meeting template 15 phut
  • Kich ban hop sales/pre-sales 15 phut (agenda + discovery + next step)
  • Kickoff playbook
  • Playbook kick-off sau ky hop dong (agenda + roles + minutes + actions)

docs.title: 3. Chon pitch theo tinh huong
docs.text:
• Gap lan dau, thoi gian rat ngan (30-60s):
  • Dung elevator pitch 30s
  • Pitch voi business stakeholder (2-5 phut):
  • Dung talk track 2 phut hoac talk track 5 phut
  • Pitch voi C-level (CEO/COO/CFO):
  • Dung compliance statement (executive)
  • Pitch voi CTO/CISO:
  • Dung elevator pitch — technical buyer
  • Pitch voi khach quoc te:
  • Dung slide-ready VI-EN hoac compliance statement VI-EN

docs.title: 4. Messaging matrix (noi dung can nhan manh)
docs.text:
• Business buyer:
  • Giam rui ro go-live, tang toc do vao production, ROI van hanh
  • Technical buyer (CTO):
  • Reliability, SLO, scalability, observability, MTTR
  • Security buyer (CISO):
  • Access control, auditability, incident response, compliance readiness
  • Executive buyer:
  • Governance, risk control, business continuity, confidence to scale

docs.title: 5. Core thong diep giu nguyen
docs.text:
• Day khong chi la chatbot demo.
  • Day la chatbot production-ready co governance va operational controls.
  • Co khung do luong (SLA/SLO/KPI), co risk control, co incident response.
  • Muc tieu cuoi: on dinh, minh bach, mo rong ben vung trong doanh nghiep.

docs.title: 6. Q&A ngan mau dung chung
docs.text:
• Hoi: "Thuoc chuan gi?" Dap: "Can chinh theo ITIL/ITSM, SRE, ISO 27001/SOC 2 control intent, va ISO 31000 risk management."

  • Hoi: "Co phai da co chung nhan chinh thuc chua?" Dap: "Hien tai la can chinh theo best practices/control intent. Co the mo rong readiness assessment va audit doc lap neu can chung nhan."

  • Hoi: "Do duoc bang gi?" Dap: "Bang SLA/SLO va KPI production: uptime, p95 latency, 5xx error rate, va quality benchmark."

  • Hoi: "Neu co su co nghiem trong?" Dap: "Da co runbook P1/P2/P3, SLA phan hoi, rollback criteria, va RCA bat buoc sau su co."

docs.title: 7. De xuat cach su dung cho team sales
docs.text:
• Truoc hop:
  • Chon 1 pitch chinh + 1 pitch backup theo doi tuong.
  • Trong hop:
  • Mo dau bang elevator 30s, sau do mo rong theo script 2-5 phut.
  • Sau hop:
  • Gui file executive hoac bilingual statement theo profile khach hang.

docs.text:
Tai lieu de gui khach nhanh theo tung tinh huong:

  • Bao gia day du

  • Bao gia VI-EN co USD reference

Goi y su dung nhanh: - Khach noi dia: dung bao gia rut gon 1 trang + mail chao gia theo goi A/B/C - Khach quoc te: dung bao gia VI-EN + USD reference + mail chao gia A/B/C song ngu - Khach can day du governance/compliance: gui them compliance statement VI-EN

docs.title: EMAIL NEWSLETTER PACK - Enterprise Chatbot | AI
Email 01 - Demo vs Production
docs.text:
Subject: Chatbot demo chay tot, vi sao vao production lai fail?

Chao Anh/Chi [Ten],

Rat nhieu du an chatbot gap cung mot van de: demo rat on, nhung vao production lai khong on dinh.

Nguyen nhan thuong khong nam o model, ma nam o van hanh: - Khong co UAT/go-live gate - Khong co SLO/SLA - Khong co runbook su co

Ben em co bai viet ngan ve cach chuyen tu demo sang production-ready: marketing blog 01 — demo vs production

Neu Anh/Chi muon, ben em co the ho tro 1 buoi assessment 60 phut de danh gia nhanh muc do san sang.

Tran trong, [Ten ban]

docs.title: Email 02 - Go-live Checklist
docs.text:
Subject: 5 muc can check truoc khi go-live chatbot

Chao Anh/Chi [Ten],

De giam rui ro go-live chatbot, team can toi thieu 5 nhom checklist: 1. UAT pass 2. KPI ky thuat dat nguong 3. Bao mat da bat 4. Rollback plan 5. Runbook su co

Chi tiet tai: marketing blog 02 — go-live checklist

Neu can, ben em gui kem mau checklist de doi chieu voi he thong hien tai.

Tran trong, [Ten ban]

docs.title: Email 03 - Case Study
docs.text:
Subject: Case study: giam tai CS/Sales bang chatbot co governance

Chao Anh/Chi [Ten],

Ben em vua tong hop mot case study ngan: - Tu hoi dap thu cong -> chatbot van hanh on dinh - Giam tai van hanh, tang toc do phan hoi - Co KPI minh bach de bao cao

Xem tai: marketing blog 03 — case study

Neu Anh/Chi quan tam, ben em de xuat workshop 90 phut de map nhanh voi bai toan cua don vi.

Tran trong, [Ten ban]

docs.title: Email 04 - Security & Compliance
docs.text:
Subject: Bao mat chatbot doanh nghiep: 5 lop kiem soat can co

Chao Anh/Chi [Ten],

Chatbot doanh nghiep can duoc thiet ke bao mat ngay tu dau. Toi thieu can co: - TLS - Auth + RBAC - Data protection - Audit log - Incident response

Chi tiet: marketing blog 04 — security & compliance

Neu Anh/Chi can, ben em co checklist gap-analysis de team security review nhanh.

Tran trong, [Ten ban]

docs.title: Email 05 - KPI SLO SLA
docs.text:
Subject: Khong do duoc thi khong cai tien duoc chatbot

Chao Anh/Chi [Ten],

De chatbot van hanh ben vung, can dong bo: - KPI (gia tri kinh doanh) - SLO (muc tieu ky thuat) - SLA (cam ket dich vu)

Xem bai tong hop: marketing blog 05 — KPI / SLO / SLA

Ben em co the ho tro setup bo KPI/SLO/SLA phu hop muc tieu kinh doanh cua Anh/Chi trong 1 buoi 60 phut.

Tran trong, [Ten ban]

docs.title: Lich gui de xuat
docs.text:
• Tuan 1: Email 01 + Email 02
  • Tuan 2: Email 03
  • Tuan 3: Email 04
  • Tuan 4: Email 05

docs.title: BLOG 01 - VI SAO CHATBOT DEMO KHONG DU CHO DOANH NGHIEP
Mo dau
docs.text: Nhieu chatbot co the demo rat nhanh, nhung khi dua vao production lai gap 3 van de lon: - Chat luong khong on dinh - Khong co quy trinh xu ly su co - Khong do luong duoc hieu qua

docs.title: Van de cot loi
docs.text:
Demo thuong chi tra loi cau hoi dep trong dieu kien ly tuong. Production can: - Tai cao - Nguoi dung that - Loi bat ngo - Yeu cau bao mat va truy vet

Neu khong co governance, chatbot de roi vao tinh trang: - "luc dung luc sai" - kho mo rong - kho bao cao cho lanh dao

docs.title: Chuyen tu demo sang production-ready can gi?
docs.text:
1. UAT checklist de nghiem thu co tieu chi
  2. Go-live checklist de kiem soat rui ro trien khai
  3. SLA/SLO de do uptime, latency, error rate
  4. Runbook incident de xu ly P1/P2/P3 nhanh
  5. Risk register de quan tri rui ro dinh ky

docs.title: Loi ich cho doanh nghiep
docs.text:
• Giam rui ro go-live
  • Tang do tin cay cua he thong
  • Co KPI ro rang de danh gia hieu qua
  • De mo rong theo team, khong phu thuoc 1 ca nhan

docs.title: Ket luan
docs.text:
Chatbot demo giup kiem chung y tuong. Chatbot production-ready moi giup doanh nghiep van hanh ben vung.

CTA: Dat lich buoi assessment 60 phut de xac dinh muc do san sang production cho chatbot cua ban.

docs.title: BLOG 02 - CHECKLIST GO-LIVE CHATBOT DOANH NGHIEP
Mo dau
docs.text: Go-live chatbot that bai khong phai vi model yeu, ma thuong vi thieu checklist van hanh. Duoi day la checklist ngan gon de giam rui ro truoc khi len production.

docs.title: 1) UAT da pass chua?
docs.text:
• Ty le test case pass >= nguong da thong nhat
  • Khong con loi Sev1
  • Loi Sev2 co workaround + owner + deadline

docs.title: 2) KPI ky thuat da dat chua?
docs.text:
• p95 latency dat nguong muc tieu
  • 5xx error rate trong nguong chap nhan
  • Monitoring va alert da bat

docs.title: 3) Bao mat da du chua?
docs.text:
• HTTPS/TLS da bat
  • Auth/RBAC da cau hinh
  • Khong log token/PII
  • Co audit trail cho hanh dong quan trong

docs.title: 4) Rollback plan da ro chua?
docs.text:
• Co dieu kien kich hoat rollback
  • Co image/version truoc release
  • Co nguoi chiu trach nhiem rollback

docs.title: 5) Runbook su co da san sang chua?
docs.text:
• Phan loai P1/P2/P3 ro rang
  • Co SLA phan hoi
  • Co kenh on-call va escalation

docs.title: Ket luan
docs.text:
Go-live an toan khong den tu may man. No den tu checklist dung va ky luat van hanh.

CTA: Nhan mau go-live checklist mien phi de doi chieu voi he thong chatbot hien tai cua ban.

docs.title: BLOG 03 - CASE STUDY: TU HOI DAP THU CONG DEN CHATBOT VAN HANH ON DINH
Bai toan
docs.text:
Mot doi ngu sales/CS mat nhieu thoi gian tra loi cau hoi lap lai: - Goi gia nao phu hop? - Chinh sach uu dai ra sao? - Huong dan thao tac co ban o dau?

Ket qua: - Thoi gian phan hoi cham - Noi dung khong dong nhat giua nhan su - Kho do hieu qua

docs.title: Cach trien khai
docs.text: Doanh nghiep trien khai chatbot theo 3 buoc: 1. Chuan hoa corpus theo domain price va guide 2. Dua vao bo governance: UAT, go-live, SLO/SLA, runbook 3. Theo doi KPI hang tuan va cai tien theo feedback

docs.title: Ket qua dau ky (tham chieu)
docs.text:
• Giam cau hoi lap lai cho team van hanh
  • Tang toc do phan hoi cau hoi co ban
  • Co du lieu KPI de bao cao minh bach

docs.title: Bai hoc rut ra
docs.text:
• Chatbot khong thay the quy trinh, chatbot can quy trinh
  • Corpus la "nhien lieu", governance la "day an toan"
  • Khong co sign-off ro rang thi kho mo rong

docs.title: Ket luan
docs.text:
Gia tri that su cua chatbot doanh nghiep la kha nang van hanh ben vung, khong chi la man demo.

CTA: Dat lich workshop 90 phut de xay lo trinh "demo -> production" cho don vi ban.

docs.title: BLOG 04 - BAO MAT VA COMPLIANCE CHO CHATBOT DOANH NGHIEP
Mo dau
docs.text: Chatbot xu ly du lieu nghiep vu, vi vay bao mat va compliance khong the de sau. Neu bo qua, rui ro lon nhat khong nam o model, ma nam o van hanh.

docs.title: 5 lop bao mat can co
docs.text:
1. Transport security: bat TLS/HTTPS
  2. Authentication/Authorization: JWT/OAuth2/SSO + RBAC
  3. Data protection: khong log token/PII, quan ly secret an toan
  4. Auditability: co audit log va truy vet su kien
  5. Incident response: runbook P1/P2/P3 + RCA

docs.title: Compliance readiness nghia la gi?
docs.text: Khong nhat thiet phai co chung nhan ngay, nhung can: - map duoc control intent - co tai lieu va bang chung van hanh - co quy trinh review dinh ky

docs.title: Sai lam pho bien
docs.text:
• Chi tap trung demo ma bo qua operations controls
  • Khong co owner cho risk va security actions
  • Khong co sign-off truoc go-live

docs.title: Ket luan
docs.text:
Bao mat la mot phan cua kien truc, khong phai buoc bo sung sau cung.

CTA: Nhan gap-analysis checklist de danh gia nhanh maturity bao mat chatbot cua ban.

docs.title: BLOG 05 - KPI, SLO, SLA: BO 3 BAT BUOC KHI VAN HANH CHATBOT
Mo dau
docs.text: Neu khong do duoc, ban khong the cai tien chatbot. Voi doanh nghiep, KPI - SLO - SLA la bo 3 de bien chatbot thanh dich vu co the cam ket.

docs.title: KPI la gi?
docs.text: KPI la chi so kinh doanh/van hanh de danh gia hieu qua: - Ty le cau hoi duoc tra loi dung ngu canh - Ty le giam tai cho team CS/Sales - Muc do hai long nguoi dung

docs.title: SLO la gi?
docs.text: SLO la muc tieu ky thuat noi bo: - p95 latency <= nguong muc tieu - 5xx error rate <= nguong cho phep - timeout rate <= nguong cho phep

docs.title: SLA la gi?
docs.text: SLA la cam ket dich vu voi khach hang: - Uptime theo thang - Thoi gian phan hoi su co P1/P2/P3 - Muc tieu khoi phuc

docs.title: Vi sao can dong bo ca 3?
docs.text:
• KPI cho biet chatbot co tao gia tri khong
  • SLO cho biet he thong co on dinh khong
  • SLA cho biet co the cam ket voi khach hang khong

Neu thieu mot trong ba, chatbot de roi vao trang thai: "van chay, nhung khong ai chac la dang chay tot."

docs.title: Ket luan
docs.text:
Khi chatbot duoc quan tri bang KPI/SLO/SLA, doi ngu moi co co so de quyet dinh mo rong hay toi uu.

CTA: Dat lich 60 phut de setup bo KPI/SLO/SLA phu hop voi muc tieu doanh nghiep cua ban.

docs.title: SOCIAL POST PACK - Enterprise Chatbot | AI
Post 01 - Demo khong du cho production
docs.text:
Nhieu chatbot demo rat muot, nhung vao production lai "vo tran". Ly do? Thieu governance va van hanh.

De chatbot doanh nghiep chay ben vung, can: - UAT checklist - Go-live checklist - SLO/SLA - Runbook su co

Khong chi "tra loi duoc", ma phai "van hanh duoc".

docs.title: Post 02 - Checklist truoc go-live
docs.text:
Truoc khi go-live chatbot, team ban da check 5 muc nay chua?

1) UAT pass 2) KPI ky thuat dat nguong 3) Bao mat da bat 4) Rollback plan ro rang 5) Runbook P1/P2/P3 san sang

Mot checklist dung co the cuu ca du an.

docs.title: Post 03 - Case study ngan
docs.text:
Tu hoi dap thu cong -> chatbot van hanh on dinh: - Giam tai cho team CS/Sales - Tang toc do phan hoi - Co KPI de bao cao minh bach

Bai hoc lon nhat: chatbot can quy trinh, khong chi can model.

docs.title: Post 04 - Bao mat va compliance
docs.text:
Bao mat chatbot khong phai "optional". Can co toi thieu 5 lop: - TLS/HTTPS - Auth + RBAC - Secret/Data protection - Audit log - Incident response

Bao mat khong lam cham du an, bao mat giup du an song lau.

docs.title: Post 05 - KPI SLO SLA
docs.text:
Khi nao chatbot duoc goi la "dich vu"?

Khi ban do duoc: - KPI (gia tri kinh doanh) - SLO (muc tieu ky thuat) - SLA (cam ket dich vu)

Khong do duoc = khong cai tien duoc.
